message:
fix(cass): resolve timeline.groups error and improve Codex CLI parsing

- Fix cassTimeline() to use correct --since Nd flag (not --days)
- Transform cass timeline's object-based groups into expected array format
- Add fallback session discovery via search when timeline returns empty
- Enhance formatSessionEntry() to parse Codex CLI nested payload format
- Detect useless cass export output (>50% UNKNOWN) and trigger fallback

Closes #7, closes #6
